title: The First Crack
description:
"Security is just an illusion if the door is ajar."
Investigate my code or the guts of this page. Maybe the flag is hidden where you least expect it.

title: Bomber War
description:
There was a bomber aircraft with a production run of nearly 1,000 units that was decommissioned almost 25 years after its maiden flight.
Could you identify the model name of this aircraft and use it as key to decipher this text? (Hint: The text is encrypted using a XOR Cipher, and don't forget to add CTF{} around the flag)

title: Chirping Bird
description:
My dog won't stop barking at the birds outside. What is bothering him?
Maybe you can find out by analyzing this recording of his barks. (Hint: The flag is all in uppercase)
